Looks good to me, will wait little longer for other to review before merge.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

Many of the pom.xml files have tabs in them. Please fix them while you have the files open for editing.

Many pom.xml files are missing a LICENSE_START line. Please fix these as well. I give an example in the top level pom.xml.

Patch Set 2:

Tomasz - Can you fix the comments identified by Tony to proceed with this patch

Patch Set 2:

What does it mean "Many of the pom.xml files have tabs in them." ?

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> What does it mean "Many of the pom.xml files have tabs in them." ?
